header.note: The source node in most cases contains the sample message as written by the developer. If it looks like a dot-delimitted string such as "form.label.firstname", then the developer has not provided a default message.

trans-unit.resname: Unable to render SEO tag for type '%typeName%' and field '%fieldName%'
trans-unit.source: Unable to render SEO tag for type '%typeName%' and field '%fieldName%'
trans-unit.target: Unable to render SEO tag for type '%typeName%' and field '%fieldName%'
trans-unit.note: key: Unable to render SEO tag for type '%typeName%' and field '%fieldName%'
